name: FloatingX
description: Android上强大的悬浮窗组件，支持 系统浮窗(需要权限)、应用内浮窗(无权限)、局部悬浮(View)，支持边缘吸附、回弹、自定义动画、位置保存、窗口化及分屏后位置修复等。Android without permission suspension window(App), support global(View), local suspension, support edge adsorption, rebound, custom animation, position saving, windowing and split-screen position repair.
